expected_main_lane_changes: Add four local UPM package references to Packages/manifest.json.
Add showcase placements to Assets/_Project/Editor/V0SceneBuilder.cs after import validation passes.
Rebuild generated scenes through Unity only after the validator import gate is green.
top_actionable_recommendations: Import in two compile batches: manifest plus import validator first, showcase and scene rebuild second.
Use the representative inventory rather than every generated asset to keep compile loops fast.
Add importer checks for MaterialsSet01 normal maps if the validator is extended beyond loadability.
Keep enemy visuals presentation-only until rigging, combat scale, and animation sockets are separately approved.
Keep weapon visuals presentation-only until hand scale, muzzle alignment, recoil clearance, and sockets pass.
Use LevelDressingSet01 props first as edge dressing, not nav-blocking collision or cover.
Create material swatch objects for MaterialsSet01 because the package has no prefabs.
Require at least one new showcase object from each relevant package family in V0LevelValidator.
Preserve delete-only rollback by avoiding direct references from live gameplay prefabs before promotion.
Run Project Tools/Validate v0 Levels after scene rebuild and before any manual lookdev signoff.
